my_thoughts: Three turns of seeking external (Guru, process, grace), now T4 flips to internal defense: 'there's nothing but conditioning.' What happened? My T3 mocked their ambition—'person can't be happy'—and they heard it as nihilism, so now defensive_fixation. The RM_02 response introduces deep sleep as counter-evidence. But will they accept their own experience?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in anxious_responsibi... Deepening with comparison_contrast in response to ego_anchoring, existential_fixation. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Surely, you cannot say so. In deep sleep you are not conditioned.
How ready and willing you are to go to sleep, how peaceful, free and happy you are when asleep!
